summary: Iteration 22 — Verified the new Super Admin company-wise data filter (searchable dropdown) end-to-end. Backend company_id scoping on /admin/stats, /admin/employees, and /admin/payroll works correctly for both super_admin (honours ?company_id=X) and company_admin (server ignores hostile ?company_id=<other> and forces user.company_id, confirmed by comparing responses across ?company_id=A vs =B vs no-param — all identical). Frontend: CompanyPicker is wired on /admin (search box, case-insensitive name match, address secondary match, Clear (X) button, selection triggers /admin/employees + /admin/stats with company_id, 'All companies' clears the filter). Same component is imported on /payroll (super_admin only, above summary card — screenshot confirmed) and on /(tabs)/index.tsx above the Admin overview bento tiles (verified via code review at app/(tabs)/index.tsx L229-240). The OLD horizontal chip filter on /admin is confirmed gone (0 elements matched [data-testid^="filter-chip-"]). Regression: /leaves, /tickets, /notifications rendered fine post-login. Super admin PIN fields were NOT touched. All 4 ephemeral TEST_ITER22_* companies created during testing were cleaned up (HTTP 200 on each DELETE).
action_items: None required for this iteration. All acceptance criteria met.

OBSERVATION (not a bug from this iteration): The hard-coded super_admin (sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com) currently has pin_must_change=true, so /(tabs)/* routes gate on the 'Set a new PIN' screen. dashboard-company-picker on (tabs)/index.tsx was verified via code review + reused-component functional testing on /admin (identical component). If a future test needs to render the tab dashboard, the user must complete PIN rotation themselves — do NOT reset it automatically (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
critical_code_review_comments: CompanyPicker.tsx L102-110: `filtered` correctly does case-insensitive matching on both name and address via toLowerCase() on the needle and both fields — matches the spec.

CompanyPicker.tsx L212-217: When allowAll=true, 'All companies' is prepended to the filtered list. Selecting it fires onChange('all'). Consumers (admin/dashboard/payroll) all handle 'all' correctly by omitting company_id from the request URL.

app/(tabs)/index.tsx L54-63: The super_admin stats fetch appends ?company_id= only when companyFilter !== 'all'. Load is wrapped in useFocusEffect + useEffect on [load], and load's deps include companyFilter, so changing the picker re-triggers the fetch immediately. Verified network traffic on /admin (uses same pattern).
app/admin.tsx L155-166: Old horizontal chip filter fully removed and replaced with <CompanyPicker>. Verified 0 elements with [data-testid^="filter-chip-"] on /admin.

app/payroll.tsx L118-128: Picker rendered inside ScrollView above the summary card and guarded by isSuper. company_admin will not see the picker (verified guard, not exercised in this run since the ephemeral company_admin was used for the backend scoping probe only).

Backend /admin/stats, /admin/payroll, /admin/employees all consistently apply the same guard pattern: `if user.role == company_admin: force user.company_id` else honour optional query param — sound and consistent. No changes needed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of web-verifiable checks — dashboard-company-picker exercised via code review + shared-component functional test on /admin, since (tabs)/* is behind the intentional 'Set new PIN' gate

seed_data_creation: Created 2 ephemeral companies during pytest (deleted at teardown) and 2 additional ephemeral companies during Playwright run (deleted at end of script). All prefixed TEST_ITER22_*. Zero long-lived seed data. Super admin PIN fields were not touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 is a pure UI-composition change: a new reusable <CompanyPicker> component + swap-ins on /admin, /(tabs)/index.tsx, /payroll. Backend endpoints were untouched but re-verified for scoping (super_admin honours ?company_id=X, company_admin ignores hostile params). The hard-coded super_admin currently has pin_must_change=true, so the /(tabs)/* routes gate before showing the dashboard-company-picker in a live web session; verification of that specific placement was done via source review + functional test of the SHARED component on /admin. Do NOT reset the super_admin PIN. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_iter22_company_filter.py for regression — it OTP-logs in the super_admin (no PIN touch), spins up ephemeral companies, and cleans up.
